routing.finding: kernels transfer correct + GPU-fast; naive per-op routing adds large host sync overhead (each realize/wait=True = separate schedule+sync) -> end-to-end gate needs graph integration (single-dispatch runtime helper)

verdict_note: kernels transfer correct + 1.53x GPU matmul speedup vs PREFILL_V2 plateau, but naive per-op routing host overhead (6.2ms >> 2.5ms GPU) swamps it; realizing the gain needs a single-dispatch graph (HCQGraph/TinyJit) runtime helper -> REDIRECT, not a clean end-to-end PASS
